positive: A complex, symmetrical bohemian celestial floral wreath design, featuring bioluminescent moon flowers, interwoven with stylized constellations and flowing vines. The artwork must have a bold, graphic quality with clean, defined silhouettes, suitable for repeating textile printing. Use deep indigo, metallic gold leaf accents, dusty violet, and emerald green. Style is a blend of highly detailed engraving, Art Nouveau flow, and cosmic vaporwave minimalism. Central composition, high contrast, smooth gradient transitions, ethereal backlighting, UHD print quality, perfect for apparel.
